pipeline_status.poller: QUIET — No substantive changes detected on dome site. All 15 recent commits are automated (monitor.py / pull_data.py). WIN-062 Tesla announcement still dated 2026-04-04. Note: wins page shows 98.5% accuracy (66/67) while homepage shows 95.2% — still present.
pipeline_status.analyst: Mode 3 (Globe Fingerprint Hunt, idle work). WIN-007 reviewed: shares IGRF/spherical harmonic dependency with WIN-006. 7/67 fingerprints reviewed. Orphan detection script has field-name bug (uses issue_id vs id) — false-positive orphan detection; all 8 alleged orphans are actually tracked in EXP-010/011/014.
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: Cycle 2 Phase 1 active. WIN-014 reviewed (confidence 0.90). Verdict "Misleading" confirmed. 14/67 WINs reviewed in Cycle 2 (WIN-001 through WIN-014). 2 moderate + 2 minor holes found; all addressed this run.

external_changes.dome_site_changes: No substantive changes. 13 automated monitor.py updates, 2 data pulls. Eclipse prediction (Aug 12, 2026) E-PRED-C still registered.

expansion_integrations.description: WIN-012 detail_evidence replaced with 4,795-char expansion. Three new arguments added: spatial heterogeneity loophole closure (with E-PRED-C smoking gun showing dome's own prediction contradicts the 6.5 µGal denominator), measurement independence critique (BOU 2017 and Mohe 1997 are different eclipses/continents/instruments/quantities), 26-year non-replication (superior SG instruments in all subsequent campaigns found null). B(r) tangential argument removed per curmudgeon recommendation.

expansions_pending_manual_apply.description: Tab reorder (generate-html.js, 9 code changes). Cannot be auto-applied. ISS-489 tracks manual apply. Human must apply from expansions/EXP-007.json code_changes array, then run: node build.js publish.

DOCX parity (build-doc-v4.js, 6 major issues). Cannot be auto-applied. Human must apply from expansions/EXP-011.json. Adds Sections 5.14-5.16 (~1,200 words), KILLSHOT-GAIA (~1,800 words), hardcoded count fix, WIN-056/057/058 improvements.
